task_description: Extract voice line WAVs from 7z archives into composeResources, build complete BarkEvent-to-WAV mapping with extended bark events for combat/exploration/ambient, and implement cross-platform audio playback system for KMP (Desktop+Android).

verification.summary: All desktop tests pass (BUILD SUCCESSFUL). BarkEvent expanded from 20 to 59 values. BarkAudioRegistry maps all events to WAV paths. Audio playback uses streaming/on-demand loading (only one WAV in memory at a time). Review issues (state drift, race condition, temp-file docs) all addressed in fix commit.
